message:
test(auth): isolate OAuth tests with atomic unique token generation

Replace hardcoded token strings ("old", "refresh-tok", "valid",
"access-tok-123", etc.) with calls to a next_token() helper backed
by a static AtomicU64 counter.  Each test invocation now gets unique
token values, preventing test collisions during parallel execution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
